code:
import io
import string

mut input = ""
match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  input = s
when None
  input = ""
end

mut total = 0
mut buf = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(input)

while i < n
  mut b = 0
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    b = v
  when None
    b = 0
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(buf)
      match string.parse_int(buf)
      when Some(x)
        if x > 0
          total = total + x * 2
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      buf = ""
    end
  else
    buf = "#{buf}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(buf)
  match string.parse_int(buf)
  when Some(x)
    if x > 0
      total = total + x * 2
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("result=#{total}")
